skill.name: decision-action
skill.description: Use this skill to make a clear choice, prioritize options, or decide go or no-go with explicit tradeoffs.
skill.summary: Choose among options with clear criteria, rationale, risks, and revisit triggers.
skill.author: BellaBe

security_audit.summary: The static weak cryptographic algorithm finding at SKILL.md:3 is a false positive. The line is a natural-language description, and no cryptography, code execution, network access, or prompt injection text was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Pattern
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged SKILL.md:3, but that line only describes decision support. No weak cryptographic algorithm or security-sensitive code is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged line is visible front matter text about choosing and prioritizing options. There is no cryptographic API, algorithm name, executable code, or data handling behavior.

content.value_statement: Important choices often stall when options and risks are unclear. This skill structures a decision, compares options, and gives a firm recommendation with revisit triggers.
actual_capabilities: Defines the decision that needs a clear answer.
Lists available options and includes doing nothing when relevant.
Compares options against explicit decision criteria.
Makes a clear recommendation instead of only describing choices.
States key risks, tradeoffs, and revisit triggers.
limitations: Does not create execution plans or project schedules.
Does not replace expert legal, medical, or financial advice.
Works best when the user provides options, goals, and constraints.
Does not gather external market data by itself.

use_cases.title: Prioritize Product Work
use_cases.description: Compare roadmap items using impact, effort, risk, and timing. Leave with one recommended next priority.

use_cases.title: Make Technical Tradeoffs
use_cases.description: Choose between implementation approaches using reliability, maintainability, delivery speed, and operational risk.

use_cases.title: Decide Go Or No-Go
use_cases.description: Review readiness, blockers, risks, and revisit triggers before committing to a launch or initiative.

prompt_templates.title: Choose Between Options
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me choose between these options: [options]. My goal is [goal]. Compare them and recommend one choice.

prompt_templates.title: Prioritize A Shortlist
prompt_templates.prompt: Prioritize these items: [items]. Use these criteria: [criteria]. Include do nothing if it is a real option.

prompt_templates.title: Make A Go Or No-Go Decision
prompt_templates.prompt: Assess whether we should go or no-go on [decision]. Consider readiness, risks, constraints, and revisit triggers.

prompt_templates.title: Evaluate A Strategic Tradeoff
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a recommendation for [decision]. Compare [options] across [criteria], explain tradeoffs, and define triggers for revisiting the choice.

output_examples.input: Choose whether to build, buy, or delay a reporting dashboard.
output: Decision statement: Choose the fastest reliable path for reporting needs.
Recommendation: Buy a tool now and revisit custom build later.
Rationale: Buying reduces delivery time and avoids maintenance risk.
Risks: Vendor lock-in and integration limits need review.

output_examples.input: Prioritize three support improvements for the next sprint.
output: Top choice: Improve ticket triage rules.
Reason: It reduces queue time with lower implementation effort.
Tradeoff: It may not solve deeper product defects.
Revisit trigger: Reassess if high-priority tickets remain unchanged after two weeks.

best_practices: Provide the real options, constraints, and decision deadline.
Name the criteria that matter most before asking for a recommendation.
Ask for risks and revisit triggers when the decision has uncertainty.
anti_patterns: Do not use it when you only need a task execution plan.
Do not ask for a firm choice without giving enough context.
Do not treat the recommendation as expert advice in regulated domains.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps choose, prioritize, or make a go or no-go decision using explicit criteria and tradeoffs.

faq.question: Can it compare several options?
faq.answer: Yes. It can list options, compare them against criteria, and recommend one path.

faq.question: Does it include doing nothing as an option?
faq.answer: Yes, when doing nothing is relevant to the decision.

faq.question: Can it create an implementation plan?
faq.answer: No. The skill is for making decisions, not planning execution steps.

faq.question: What input should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide the decision, options, goals, constraints, criteria, and any deadline.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The only static finding was reviewed as a false positive, and no dangerous behavior was found.
